_comment: Machine-readable companion to PORT_STATE.md, consumed by PortState.java. A calc path is considered ported iff it appears in 'ported' OR its 'paths' entry equals "ported". At v0.1.4 (Milestone 3) the PlayerVsNpcCalc.dps (getExpectedAttackSpeed + getDpt + getDps) and PlayerVsNpcCalc.ttk (getHtk + getTtk) paths are now ported in addition to distribution/accuracy/defenceRoll/maxMeleeHit/maxRangedHit/maxMagicHit. Every maxHit row asserts via getMax() (the distribution top = upstream's maxHit) — including the blisterwood row (55 via the vampyrebane scaleDamage(5,4)); the dps rows assert getDps() and the ttk row asserts getTtk() at relative <= 1e-9.
